CustomField.description: Specifies the Java SimpleDateFormat pattern used to format date values when they appear in auto-generated Opportunity names. For example, "yyyy-MM-dd" produces "2026-01-15", "MM/dd/yyyy" produces "01/15/2026", and "MMMM yyyy" produces "January 2026". If blank, the Salesforce user locale default date format is used. Applies to any {!CloseDate} or other date field tokens in the Opportunity Name Format.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Date format pattern (e.g., yyyy-MM-dd) for date fields in auto-generated Opportunity names. Blank uses the locale default.
CustomField.label: Date Format
